fields.name: Cost Type No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the subtype of the cost center. This is an information field and is not used for any other purposes. Choose the field to select the cost subtype.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related document.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the cost journal entry.

fields.name: Bal. Cost Type No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the type that a balancing entry for the journal line is posted to.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the entry in the cost journal.

fields.name: Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the balance of the cost type.

fields.name: Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent debits.

fields.name: Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent credits.

fields.name: Cost Center Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost center code. The code serves as a default value for cost posting that is captured later in the cost journal.

fields.name: Cost Object Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost object code. The code serves as a default value for cost posting that is captured later in the cost journal.

fields.name: Bal. Cost Center Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the cost center that a balancing entry for the journal line is posted to.

fields.name: Bal. Cost Object Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the cost center that a balancing entry for the journal line is posted to.

fields.name: G/L Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry number of the corresponding general ledger entry that is associated with this cost entry. For combined entries, the entry number of the last general ledger entry is saved in the field. This is the entry with the highest entry number.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.
